top_headline: AMD $10.3B +38% blowout — DC +57%, Meta+OpenAI 12GW, dual-vendor AI era opens; PLTR/SHOP sell-the-news
chapters: I · MACRO — SPX ATH 7,259 / Nasdaq ATH 25,326 / SOX New High / ADP+DIS+UBER+ARM+APP Today / NFP Fri 49K Cons
II · AI TRADE — AMD $10.3B +38% Beat / DC $5.8B +57% / Meta 6GW + OpenAI 6GW MI450 / Q2 Guide $11.2B
III · EARNINGS — AMD +16.5% AH / SHOP -8.7% Rev Beat / PLTR -6.59% Beat-But-Sell / Honor Roll / Movers
IV · GEOPOLITICS — Hormuz Week 4 / Brent $113.54 / Fujairah Hub Damaged / Ceasefire Barely Held
V · TRACK RECORD — Vol I No 002 Setups: AMD +23.6% WIN / AAPL -0.95% FLAT / PLTR -1.19% FLAT

flagged_setups.thesis: Post-blowout continuation: Meta+OpenAI 12GW combined mandate represents multi-year institutional demand anchor. Q2 guide $11.2B vs $10.5B cons — sequential DC ramp confirmation. MI450 (432GB HBM4, 19.6TB/s) is first hyperscaler-co-engineered AMD GPU; HBM4 supply constraints from MU/SK Hynix could gating risk. Entry at AH print ~$414. Risk: 3-day post-earnings gap fill; ROCm ecosystem concern could resurface at developer conferences.
flagged_setups.price_note: ~$414 AH close May 5 (EBC Financial: 'AMD Stock Tops $400 After Hours' / CNBC +16.5% from $355.26 close = ~$413.60) · AMD IR May 5 2026

flagged_setups.thesis: Beat-but-sell pattern confirmed. Rev $3.17B +34% beat (vs $3.08B est), GMV $101B — no issue with top line. Problem: rising transaction and loan losses at P/E 135x. Market has now sold two consecutive PLTR beats and one SHOP beat — high-multiple growth exhaustion is the trade. Entry ~$116.45 PM. Key risk: positive ADP or NFP could lift all growth stocks indiscriminately.
flagged_setups.price_note: ~$116.45 pre-market May 6 (Investing.com: 'Shopify Q1 2026 slides: stock falls on concerns' pre-market −8.7%) · Investing.com May 5-6 2026

flagged_setups.thesis: Continuation from prior issue. Fujairah terminal hit May 4 — both Hormuz AND the Fujairah bypass now damaged. Ceasefire 'barely held' per CNBC. Slight pullback to $113.54 from $114.44 peak but structural supply disruption unchanged. No diplomatic breakthrough. Warsh inheriting oil shock + PCE +4.5% = zero rate-cut cover = oil bid preserved. Floor ~$110 until Fujairah repair or genuine ceasefire.
flagged_setups.price_note: $113.54 Brent at 02:00 GMT May 6 (slight pullback from $114.44 May 4 peak) · Al Jazeera / CNBC / Trading Economics May 5-6 2026

watchlist_hits.event: Q1 FY2026 earnings AH May 5 — Rev $10.3B +38% vs $9.84B est; EPS $1.37 vs $1.27; DC $5.8B +57%; Q2 guide $11.2B vs $10.5B cons; Meta 6GW + OpenAI 6GW MI450 mandates

AMD Meta+OpenAI 12GW partnerships — structural dual-vendor signal. SOX new ATH suggests market prices expanded TAM not NVDA displacement. Read-across: NVDA Blackwell demand unchanged but market share concentration risk re-priced.
watchlist_hits.move: SOX new ATH; NVDA watch on open May 6

watchlist_hits.event: Sell-the-news reaction: Rev $1.63B +85% YoY beat, EPS $0.33 vs $0.28 beat — stock fell 6.59% to $135.68. ~200x fwd P/E valuation overrode the fundamental beat. Pattern: second quarter running.

Custom silicon narrative — AMD+Meta co-engineering of MI450 is direct read-across. AVGO also has custom chip co-development with Google (TPU) and Meta. Structural positive for AVGO's custom silicon model.

tase_events.event: TA-125 context: Iran/Fujairah attack geopolitical escalation — Israel adjacent risk; Brent $113+ net negative for Israeli energy import costs; defense sector demand from conflict-economy persists. No single material TASE event today.

narrative_threads: Dual-vendor AI era opens: Meta and OpenAI simultaneously commit 12GW to AMD Instinct MI450 — NVDA's monopoly on frontier model training structurally diluted; SOX ATH confirms market prices expanded total silicon TAM

Beat-but-sell exhaustion: PLTR (second time), SHOP, and prior META/MSFT — high-multiple growth names sold on beats; AMD escaped via structural re-rate catalyst (12GW partnerships), not just quarterly beat
Hormuz/Fujairah week 4+: Brent slight pullback but structural supply disruption unchanged; Fujairah terminal damaged removes bypass route; Warsh inherits oil shock + PCE +4.5% with zero cut cover
Warsh transition T-9 days: Full Senate vote week of May 11; takes over May 15; inherits SPX ATH, SOX ATH, Brent $113, PCE +4.5% — no policy room on either side

Track record theme: AMD flagged May 1 at $335 delivered 23.6% WIN in 3 trading days via pre-earnings structural thesis; PLTR flat despite correct fundamental view — valuation risk cannot be eliminated by conviction
